_source_chunk:
CAPTCHA Advantages and Disadvantages
key Advantages of CAPTCHA:
● It’s highly worthwhile to discourage spam and unwanted access 
● It can stop fake and ill-intended website access or usage 
● CAPTCHAs are an easy way to improve the website’s accessibility

question: What is the purpose of the User Agent string?
answer: It identifies the browser/HTTP client and operating system of the request source.
paraphrases: What does the User Agent string do?
What information does the User Agent string provide?
_source_chunk:
The User Agent 
is a string sent with every request. It identifies the 
browser/HTTP client and operating system of the request 
source. https://www.zenrows.com/blog/bypass-captcha-web-scraping#how-to-bypass-captcha

question: How do most clients address an image-based CAPTCHA?
paraphrases: What is the typical response time for most clients addressing an image-based CAPTCHA?
How fast can most clients solve an image-based CAPTCHA?
_source_chunk:
The customer 
should know which images has a specific feature among a group of 
images. Google, then again, utilizes Google Street View CAPTCHAs that expect 
clients to enter a street address or a road sign into the material box. Most clients can address an image based CAPTCHA very quickly.

question: What is the primary goal of emotion detection in text analysis?
answer: identifies the emotion expressed in the text
paraphrases: What does emotion detection in text analysis aim to achieve?
What is the main purpose of emotion detection in text analysis?
_source_chunk:
2. Emotion Detection
● Emotion detection is an advanced version of the above technique, which 
identifies the emotion expressed in the text, such as joy, anger, sadness, etc. ● This technique is particularly helpful in understanding the feelings and 
attitudes of the individuals behind the text.
